repos.name: Portfolio
repos.description: A modern developer portfolio built with React and TanStack, showcasing projects, skills, and experience with a focus on performance, clean architecture, and responsive UI design.

repos.name: terraform-visualizer
repos.description: A web-based tool that converts Terraform code into an interactive infrastructure dependency graph, helping developers visualize and understand cloud resources and their relationships.

repos.name: backup
repos.description: A production-style Bash automation utility for managing and running filesystem backups. It supports multiple tracked directories, instant or scheduled backups, and generates compressed, timestamped archives with safe path resolution.

repos.name: subnet
repos.description: Subnet is a LAN-based peer discovery system enabling real-time multi-peer chat and file transfer across devices on the same network, built with a login-free, cloudless architecture for fast local communication.

repos.name: zenvoy
repos.description: Zenvoy is a safety-first routing application that goes beyond shortest-path navigation by prioritizing safer travel routes based on risk-aware parameters, helping users choose more secure paths over purely optimal distance-based routes.

repos.name: chalo
repos.description: Chalo is a real-time group location system supporting live tracking, central coordinate-based grouping, and role-based access control, including an “overseer” mode that enables one-way location visibility for safety monitoring without reciprocal sharing.

repos.name: vagrant
repos.description: Vagrant is an Infrastructure as Code (IaC) setup for provisioning reproducible multi-VM environments, including automated configurations for WordPress deployments, portfolio hosting, and scalable development infrastructure.

repos.name: PassItOn
repos.description: College-focused peer-to-peer marketplace for buying and selling second-hand items with chat-based exchange.

repos.name: CoupleUp
repos.description: React Native dating app with free and premium tiered matchmaking system.
